questionHtml:
For a thermodynamic process, the entropy of the universe


A.  always increases during the process

B.  depends only on energy transferred during the process

C.  is zero during the process

D.  never decreases during the process

meta.title: For a thermodynamic process, the entropy of the universe A. always increases during the process B. depends only on energy transferred during the process C. is zero during the proce
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
